name: Wholemeal Zucchini Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
To make the cake: Preheat oven to 180°C. Lightly grease and flour a 20cm ring tin. In a bowl, beat together the oil, sugar, eggs, and vanilla for 5 minutes. Stir in the grated zucchini and walnuts. Gradually fold in the remaining dry ingredients and spoon the mixture into the prepared tin.
To make the topping and cook the cake: Toss the apple slices in lemon juice and arrange on top of the cake mixture. Combine the walnuts, sugar, and allspice, then spread over the apple. Bake in a preheated 180°C oven for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a skewer inserted into the centre comes out clean. Remove from the oven and let cool in the tin for 5 minutes before turning out. Serve warm or cold with or without butter. Enjoy your cake with great care and love.
